## What happened

A clear, concrete description of the problem. State what you expected the OS to do and what it did instead.

## Which skill, flow, or loop

Name the exact piece (for example `architect-before-code`, `idea-to-mva-flow`, `daily-agent-standup`). If it spans several, list them.

## Which platform

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Gemini
- [ ] No-code (copy-paste prompt into Claude.ai, ChatGPT, Lovable, Bolt, v0, Replit)

1.
2.
3.

- **Expected:**

## Anything else

Logs, the exact prompt you pasted, screenshots, or the placeholders you filled in. The more concrete the evidence, the faster the fix.
